category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Morocco) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Morocco Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入摩洛哥：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入摩洛哥：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Morocco requirements: IMANOR NM standards adopting IEC 62133, Ministry of Industry mandatory import conformity (CMIM-type attestation), ANRT radio approval, UN 38.3 transport, and in-country importer obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与摩洛哥要求对照：IMANOR采用IEC 62133的NM标准、工业部强制进口符合性（CMIM类型认证）、ANRT无线电核准、UN 38.3运输及当地进口商义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與摩洛哥要求對照：IMANOR採用IEC 62133的NM標準、工業部強制進口符合性（CMIM類型認證）、ANRT無線電核准、UN 38.3運輸及當地進口商義務。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters to Morocco must meet IMANOR NM standards (adopting IEC 62133) for cell safety, obtain Ministry of Industry import conformity (CMIM-type attestation of conformity), secure ANRT approval for any wireless functions, hold a valid UN 38.3 transport report, and ship through an in-country Moroccan importer — none of which are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification. Morocco has no EU-style horizontal battery regulation, RoHS regime, or carbon-footprint/EPR battery framework.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口商进入摩洛哥，须满足IMANOR采用IEC 62133的NM电芯安全标准、取得工业部进口符合性（CMIM类型符合性认证）、为任何无线功能取得ANRT核准、持有有效UN 38.3运输报告，并通过当地摩洛哥进口商进口——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。摩洛哥没有欧盟式横向电池法规、RoHS制度或碳足迹/EPR电池框架。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口商進入摩洛哥，須滿足IMANOR採用IEC 62133的NM電芯安全標準、取得工業部進口符合性（CMIM類型符合性認證）、為任何無線功能取得ANRT核准、持有有效UN 38.3運輸報告，並通過當地摩洛哥進口商進口——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。摩洛哥沒有歐盟式橫向電池法規、RoHS制度或碳足跡/EPR電池框架。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred (imanor.gov.ma, anrt.ma, douane.gov.ma, unece.org).
